---
title: "Untargeted Viromics"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
---
  
## Slides

  
```{=html}
<style>
  #myid {
    border: 10px solid rgba(20,130,130,.2);
    margin: 0;
  }
  .myclass {
    max-width: 100%;
    width: 100%;
    height: 550px;
  }
</style>
```


<a href=UntargetedViromics.pdf>Download Slides</a>

![](UntargetedViromics.pdf){#myid .myclass}


{{< include UntargetedViromics.qmd >}}


{{< include Viral_Prediction_Workflow_in_Metagenomics_Samples.md >}}
